utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: And what cool is , the character is from Naples , right ?

utterances.speaker: The Director
utterances.text: Oh that is great ! Okay , well I have heard everything I need to hear . We just need to uh , Leslie ?

utterances.speaker: The Casting Director
utterances.text: Joey , this is the awkward part .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Oh ! Hey right ! Not a problem .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: I totally understand . You need to y’know make sure I don’t have any horrible scars or tattoos . Don’t you worry . I have nothing to hide .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: So there you go , that is me .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: I tell you , that has never happened before .
